issues.description: Card has protective effect text but effects array is empty. Should contain OnAttacked/Counter trigger with conditional return-to-hand action.
Missing trigger. Text describes a replacement/prevention effect: should use 'Counter' trigger to intercept opponent's removal effect.
Missing conditions: must check (1) target Character has base cost ≤7, (2) target is not named [Sabo], (3) effect is from opponent.
Missing action: should include ReturnToHand for the protected Character.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your Character with a base cost of 7 or less other than [Sabo] would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may return this Character to the owner's hand instead.
